# plotjs

![GitHub Workflow
Status](https://img.shields.io/github/actions/workflow/status/arkraieski/plotjs/check-standard.yaml)

GitHub Workflow Status

The goal of plotjs is provide to a base ‘graphics’-like interface to the
[Chart.js](https://www.chartjs.org/) JavaScript charting library. The
main
[`plotjs()`](https://arkraieski.github.io/plotjs/reference/plotjs.md)
function is an S3 generic like the base
[`plot()`](https://rdrr.io/r/graphics/plot.default.html) function with
methods for various base R objects.

Besides `htmlwidgets`, it has minimal R dependencies. Tidyverse not
required!

## Installation

You can install the development version from
[GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r
# install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github("arkraieski/plotjs")
```

## Example

Here’s some example code for a basic scatter plot using R’s `airquality`
dataset:

``` r
library(plotjs)
air <- airquality
plotjs(air$Ozone, air$Solar.R, 
       main = "New York Air Quality Measurements", 
       xlab = "Ozone (ppb)",
       ylab = "Solar Radiation (lang)",
       col = "red")
```

## Methods

To see a list of S3 methods:

``` r
library(plotjs)
methods(plotjs)
#> [1] plotjs.default*  plotjs.density*  plotjs.factor*   plotjs.function*
#> [5] plotjs.lm*      
#> see '?methods' for accessing help and source code
```

More are on the way! The goal is to replicate the behavior of base R
[`plot()`](https://rdrr.io/r/graphics/plot.default.html) methods as
closely as possible while also getting the benefits of using a
Chart.js-backed interactive widget. Each method has its own help page
that can be accessed for additional information.

## Testing

The package is tested on Windows, Linux, and MacOS.

# Package index

## Main plotting functions

- [`plotjs()`](https://arkraieski.github.io/plotjs/reference/plotjs.md)
  : Generic Plotting with 'Chart.js'
- [`plotjs(`*`<default>`*`)`](https://arkraieski.github.io/plotjs/reference/plotjs.default.md)
  : The Default plotjs Scatterplot Function
- [`plotjs(`*`<density>`*`)`](https://arkraieski.github.io/plotjs/reference/plotjs.density.md)
  : plotjs Method for Kernel Density Estimation
- [`plotjs(`*`<factor>`*`)`](https://arkraieski.github.io/plotjs/reference/plotjs.factor.md)
  : Factor Variable Bar Plots
- [`plotjs(`*`<function>`*`)`](https://arkraieski.github.io/plotjs/reference/plotjs.function.md)
  : Draw Function Plots with 'Chart.js'
- [`plotjs(`*`<lm>`*`)`](https://arkraieski.github.io/plotjs/reference/plotjs.lm.md)
  : plotjs Diagnostics for an lm Object
- [`plotjsbarplot()`](https://arkraieski.github.io/plotjs/reference/plotjsbarplot.md)
  : plotjs Bar Plots
- [`plotjspie()`](https://arkraieski.github.io/plotjs/reference/plotjspie.md)
  : plotjs Pie Charts

## Shiny bindings

- [`plotjsOutput()`](https://arkraieski.github.io/plotjs/reference/plotjs-shiny.md)
  [`renderplotjs()`](https://arkraieski.github.io/plotjs/reference/plotjs-shiny.md)
  : Shiny bindings for plotjs
- [`plotjsbarplotOutput()`](https://arkraieski.github.io/plotjs/reference/plotjsbarplot-shiny.md)
  [`renderPlotjsbarplot()`](https://arkraieski.github.io/plotjs/reference/plotjsbarplot-shiny.md)
  : Shiny bindings for plotjsbarplot
- [`plotjspieOutput()`](https://arkraieski.github.io/plotjs/reference/plotjspie-shiny.md)
  [`renderPlotjspie()`](https://arkraieski.github.io/plotjs/reference/plotjspie-shiny.md)
  : Shiny bindings for plotjspie
